results.title: Short real policy statement
notes: Short factual text benchmark for the fine-tuned news model.
Preferred over full copied articles for demo and regression checks.

results.title: Short fake sensational claim
notes: Regression case for sensational fake-news wording.
Use this to confirm the model still separates obvious fake text from neutral reporting.

results.title: Optional image provenance sample
notes: Optional local benchmark. Add a known AI-generated image with intact provenance if you want image regression checks.

results.title: Optional voice-clone sample
notes: Optional local benchmark. Add a known synthetic sample to include audio in the regression suite.
